value_chain_position: MEMS-based precision timing semiconductors — replaces quartz oscillators with silicon timing chips across data-center networking, 5G, automotive and edge IoT applications.
relative_comps: SiTime is the dominant MEMS timing company globally with ~75% market share in precision oscillators sold into communications and data-center applications; its silicon timing chips are more accurate, programmable and reliable than quartz alternatives. Revenue surged 65% YoY as data-center networking and 5G base-station demand rebounded. The TAM is relatively small (~$2B) but SiTime is the clear category leader. Competes with Microchip (post-Microsemi/IDT acquisition) and legacy quartz suppliers; its MEMS moat is durable but the application is a niche enabler, not a macro chokepoint. Trades at ~70x forward earnings.
